locked_decision: Use PH-guided recursive scene partitioning and train the main target as hard pixel occupancy: raw_count > 0. Model input is limited to physically interpretable channels: DNB brightness, PH persistence, and PH seed map.
description: Pixel-level binary ship-presence experiment on the fixed DNB/AIS split. PH recursively subdivides large anchors before fallback tiles cover remaining sea pixels. The U-Net emits independent per-pixel sigmoid logits from brightness plus minimal PH structure channels; patch-level O/X is an auxiliary head only.

primary_target.name: hard_pixel_occupancy
primary_target.definition: target_pixel = 1 if raw_count > 0 else 0, masked by the partition owner sea mask
primary_target.prediction: pixel_logits -> sigmoid(pixel_logits), thresholded at 0.5 for fixed metrics and calibrated on val for evaluation

gt_smoothing.rationale: DNB brightness can be visually diffuse, but AIS-derived label identity should not be spread into neighboring pixels for the main O/X target.

patch_occupancy_auxiliary.rationale: Patch O/X is retained only as a weak regularizer so the model notices empty patches; it is not the reporting target.

dice_auxiliary.rationale: Keep the first hard-target run simple. Dice can be enabled later if weighted BCE collapses to all-background.

spatial_softmax_overlap.rationale: The new pixel head is independent sigmoid, not a per-patch probability distribution softmax.

patching.input_channel_policy: Only physically interpretable observation/topology hints are model inputs. Parent/child PH masks, soft attention, and anchor lifetime are proposal metadata only and are not fed to the U-Net.
patching.loss_weight: valid owner mask only. Pixel binary loss uses raw_count > 0 and does not consume the smoothed target as label.

partitioning.policy: PH anchors claim valid sea pixels first. Large PH anchors are recursively subdivided until target size or max depth; fallback grid assigns remaining valid sea pixels exactly once.

hierarchical_ph.policy: When recursive is enabled, child PH clusters that still exceed the target size are not emitted as training patches; their descendants or fallback grid cover the area.

loss.name: pixel_binary_occupancy_loss
loss.rationale: Main target is hard per-pixel AIS occupancy from raw_count > 0. Patch-level O/X is auxiliary only; smoothed density is ignored by the loss.
